positive: A mesmerizing symmetrical cosmic nebula pattern, designed as a continuous repeating tapestry for textile printing. The composition centers on stylized, geometric representations of constellations and stellar bodies—think polished obsidian and luminous ether. Incorporate elements like sacred geometry mandalas, flowing ethereal ribbons of starlight, and sharply defined crystalline asteroid trails. The primary color palette should be deep indigo, vibrant sapphire blue, iridescent teal, and accented by shimmering gold and electric violet, ensuring high contrast against a deep background. Use a vector-art, detailed engraving aesthetic mixed with bioluminescent watercolor washes. The image must maintain clean, scalable silhouettes and sharp edges suitable for apparel printing.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, low detail, text, signatures, watermarks, copyright, messy, cluttered, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, graffiti, logos, trademarks, cartoon, photographic, realistic human figures
